overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character running through a rocky canyon environment at dusk, approaching and passing through massive ancient stone archways. The scene features warm reddish-brown rock textures against a dark purple sky, with the character carrying a light source through the increasingly enclosed mountain path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path approaching ancient stone gateway

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the canyon path toward the massive stone archway visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall irregular reddish-brown rock face forming the canyon wall
massive stone gateway structure with tall pillars silhouetted against the purple sky
low wall or barrier running alongside the right edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrow rocky canyon path at dusk, with steep reddish cliffs on the left and a low stone barrier on the right. In the distance, a massive ancient stone archway looms against the dark purple sky, serving as the clear focal point ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone gateway between massive carved pillars

events.description: entering the massive stone archway gateway, transitioning from open canyon to enclosed passage

agents.ego_description: running through the stone archway into the darker canyon passage beyond

entered.detail: shadowed canyon interior visible through the archway opening

segments.scene_description: The character passes between the massive carved stone pillars of the ancient gateway, entering a more enclosed and darker space. The sky becomes mostly obscured by the archway structure as the path continues into the shadowed canyon beyond, with the stone walls now towering immediately on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow canyon that transitions from an open dusk landscape into a shadowed, enclosed mountain pass. It begins with the character running along a rocky path flanked by steep reddish cliffs and a low stone barrier, while a massive ancient archway looms in the distance against a dark purple sky. As the character advances, the camera draws closer to the focal point, moving directly between the towering carved stone pillars of the gateway. The scene then shifts into a more oppressive atmosphere as the archway obscures the sky, leading the character into a darker space where the stone walls rise immediately on both sides.
